subcodes.first_line: O people of God! The Call hath been raised high, the Cause is manifest, the Light hath dawned, and the precincts of Sinai are adorned and illumined by the Speaker. A mighty celebration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حزب الله ندا مرتفع امر ظاهر نور مشرق ساحت طور بمکلم مزین و منور جشن عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized)
